title: Updating Apps
drDigitalIntro:
App updates bring new features and security fixes.
• Keeping apps updated protects you.
• Most devices update apps automatically.
• Updates are free if the app was free.

steps.say: Click 'My Apps' to see your installed apps.
WeatherNow has an update available — click Update next to it.

drDigitalSuccess: You updated an app! Keeping apps updated protects you from security vulnerabilities.
drDigitalHint: Go to My Apps and look for apps with an Update button next to them.
